data.title: Diagnos’ CARA System License Application Advances with Health Canada
data.description:
Diagnos ( (TSE:ADK) ) has issued an announcement.

Diagnos Inc. has announced that its application for a medical device license for its CARA System is now under active processing by Health Canada, following a period of backlog. This development is a significant step in the company’s growth strategy, as the CARA System is integral to its mission of providing advanced medical diagnostic solutions.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ADK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ADK is a Underperform.

Diagnos struggles with severe financial challenges, marked by consistent losses and negative equity. While technical indicators suggest a neutral outlook, the stock remains under pressure due to a lack of profitability. Recent corporate initiatives provide some potential for growth, but the overall financial health and valuation remain significant concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ADK stock, click here.

More about Diagnos

DIAGNOS Inc. is a publicly traded Canadian corporation specializing in the early detection of critical eye-related health problems. Utilizing Artificial Intelligence, the company aims to enhance diagnostic accuracy, streamline healthcare workflows, and improve patient outcomes globally.

data.title: Caracal Gold PLC Advances with Kilimapesa Audit Completion
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Caracal Gold PLC ( (GB:GCAT) ).

Caracal Gold PLC announced the completion of audited accounts for its Kenyan subsidiary, Kilimapesa Gold Limited, marking a significant step towards finalizing its consolidated accounts for 2024. This development is crucial for advancing the company’s recapitalization plans and resuming trading on the London Stock Exchange, potentially impacting its operational restructuring and market positioning.

More about Caracal Gold PLC

Caracal Gold PLC is an East African-focused gold company with a strategy to grow production and resources both organically and through strategic acquisitions. The company aims to increase production to over 50,000 ounces per annum and build a JORC-compliant resource base of over 3 million ounces. Caracal is optimizing its Kilimapesa Gold Mine in Kenya and exploring the Nyakafuru Project in Tanzania, aiming for significant expansion and increased production. The company is committed to responsible mining practices and contributing positively to local communities.

YTD Price Performance: -1.79%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £5.41M

data.title: BeLive Holdings Completes $10 Million IPO on Nasdaq
data.description:
BeLive Holdings ( (BLIV) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 3, 2025, BeLive Holdings entered into an underwriting agreement with R.F. Lafferty & Co., Inc. for a public offering of 2,450,000 ordinary shares at $4.00 per share, with a 45-day option for underwriters to purchase additional shares. The offering closed on April 7, 2025, with shares approved for Nasdaq listing under the ticker ‘BLIV’. BeLive aims to use the proceeds to advance its video and AI technologies, expand its solutions, and enhance marketing efforts.

More about BeLive Holdings

Headquartered in Singapore, BeLive Holdings provides live commerce and shoppable short video solutions to international retail companies and e-commerce marketplaces. Their offerings include an enterprise-grade White Label Solution and a cloud-based SaaS solution, enabling customers to leverage interactive and immersive video commerce.

data.title: Straits Trading Launches New Digital Commercial Paper Series
data.description:
An announcement from Straits Trading Co. Ltd. ( (SG:S20) ) is now available.

The Straits Trading Company Limited has launched the third series of its 3-month commercial paper in digital securities on the SDAX platform, targeting accredited and institutional investors with an interest rate of 3.20% per annum. The issuance aims to raise between S$5 million and S$10 million, reflecting the company’s strategic move to leverage digital platforms for capital raising, potentially impacting its financial operations and market positioning.

More about Straits Trading Co. Ltd.

Incorporated in 1887, The Straits Trading Company Limited is a conglomerate-investment company with operations and financial interests in resources, property, and hospitality. It holds strategic stakes in Malaysia Smelting Corporation Berhad, a leading tin producer, ESR Group Limited, and Far East Hospitality Holdings, along with a diversified property portfolio.

data.title: Times China Holdings Reports Q1 2025 Contracted Sales
data.description:
Times China Holdings ( (HK:1233) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Times China Holdings Limited announced that its aggregated contracted sales for the first quarter of 2025 reached approximately RMB1,250 million, covering a gross floor area of about 114,000 square meters. In March 2025 alone, the company’s contracted sales were approximately RMB320 million. These figures are preliminary and unaudited, intended for investor reference, and may differ from future audited financial statements. Stakeholders are advised to exercise caution when interpreting this data.

More about Times China Holdings

Times China Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the real estate industry. It focuses on property development and sales, primarily in China, with a market emphasis on residential and commercial properties.

data.title: Alphamin Resources to Resume Operations at Bisie Tin Mine
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Alphamin Resources ( (TSE:AFM) ).

Alphamin Resources Corp. has announced the phased resumption of operations at its Bisie tin mine in the Democratic Republic of the Congo following the withdrawal of insurgents from the area. The company plans to redeploy employees and restart tin production while monitoring the security situation. Despite the temporary halt in operations due to security concerns, Alphamin successfully exported approximately 4,500 tonnes of tin in the first quarter of 2025, with additional stock still in transit.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AFM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AFM is a Outperform.

Alphamin Resources presents strong financial performance highlighted by impressive revenue growth and profitability. However, technical indicators suggest caution due to downward momentum and oversold conditions. Despite these technical concerns, the stock’s valuation remains appealing with a solid P/E ratio and high dividend yield, offering potential for long-term value.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AFM stock, click here.

More about Alphamin Resources

Alphamin Resources Corp. is a mining company operating in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, primarily focused on the production of tin. The company is listed on the TSX Venture Exchange and JSE AltX, and its operations are centered around the Bisie tin mine in the Walikale District of North Kivu Province.

Average Trading Volume: 1,411,571

data.title: Rosenbauer International AG Announces 33rd Annual General Meeting
data.description:
An update from Rosenbauer International ( (GB:0FRW) ) is now available.

Rosenbauer International AG has announced the convening of its 33rd Annual General Meeting, scheduled for May 8, 2025, in Linz, Austria. The meeting will cover key agenda items including the presentation of financial statements for 2024, ratification of actions by the Executive and Supervisory Boards, election of auditors for 2025, and resolutions on remuneration policies. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it addresses the company’s financial health and governance, impacting future strategic decisions and shareholder engagement.

More about Rosenbauer International

Rosenbauer International AG is a company based in Austria, known for its manufacturing of firefighting vehicles and equipment. The company operates in the emergency services industry, focusing on providing innovative solutions for firefighting and disaster management.

data.title: UOB-Kay Hian Completes Voluntary Liquidation of Subsidiary
data.description:
The latest update is out from UOB-Kay Hian Holdings Limited ( (SG:U10) ).

UOB-Kay Hian Holdings Limited has announced the completion of the members’ voluntary liquidation of its subsidiary, UOB Kay Hian Trading Pte Ltd, effective from April 3, 2025. The liquidation of this subsidiary will not materially affect the company’s net tangible assets or earnings per share for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, indicating a minimal impact on the company’s overall financial health and operations.

More about UOB-Kay Hian Holdings Limited

UOB-Kay Hian Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Republic of Singapore, operating in the financial services industry. It is primarily involved in brokerage services, investment banking, and other financial services, focusing on providing comprehensive solutions to its clients in the financial markets.

data.title: CCID Consulting Announces 2024 AGM and Dividend Proposal
data.description:
CCID Consulting Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2176) ) just unveiled an update.

CCID Consulting Company Limited has announced its 2024 Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for May 21, 2025, in Beijing, where shareholders will consider various resolutions, including the approval of the 2024 directors’ and auditors’ reports, re-appointment of auditors, and the distribution of a final dividend. The company has proposed a final dividend of RMB0.11 per share for 2024, with payment expected by June 27, 2025, pending shareholder approval. This AGM and proposed dividend distribution reflect the company’s ongoing commitment to transparency and shareholder value.

More about CCID Consulting Co. Ltd. Class H

CCID Consulting Company Limited is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China. It operates in the consulting industry, providing advisory services and market analysis primarily focused on technology and industrial sectors.

data.title: FOPE S.p.A. Announces Shareholders’ Meeting and Board Renewal
data.description:
FOPE S.p.A. ( (IT:FPE) ) has issued an announcement.

FOPE S.p.A. has announced the call for its Ordinary and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 24, 2025. The meeting will address the approval of the 2024 financial statements, allocation of financial results, and the appointment of a new Board of Directors. Additionally, an extraordinary session will discuss a free increase of share capital and amendments to the company’s articles of association. The meeting will be held exclusively via telecommunication, with participation facilitated through a designated representative.

More about FOPE S.p.A.

FOPE S.p.A. is an Italian goldsmith company known for its high-end jewelry, and it is listed on Euronext Growth Milan.
